name: Castro Street
content: There are a lot of restaurants here, and many of them are good, so I won’t bother naming any specific restaurant. There are also lots of other cool stores here that are worth checking out. Castro Street is conveniently located next to the Mountain View CalTrain station. There is a farmers market every Sunday morning in the CalTrain station parking lot, which remains lively year round. Sometimes people from Palo Alto will hang out on Castro Street instead of their own downtown. Generally a good hang out spot.
